# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /Users/sedwards/source/nlav2/build
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/local/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

WITH_DEBUG_TSG:BOOL=OFF

WITH_EMBEDDED_CLI_IN_RDP_FILES:BOOL=OFF

//Enable feature FAAC for codec
WITH_FAAC:BOOL=OFF

//Enable feature FAAD2 for codec
WITH_FAAD2:BOOL=OFF

WITH_FDK_AAC:BOOL=OFF

//Enable FFMPEG for audio/video encoding/decoding
WITH_FFMPEG:BOOL=OFF

//Build FreeRDP deprecated symbols
WITH_FREERDP_DEPRECATED:BOOL=OFF

//Build FreeRDP deprecated command line options
WITH_FREERDP_DEPRECATED_COMMANDLINE:BOOL=OFF

//Use <appdata>/Vendor/Product instead of <appdata>/product (lowercase,

WITH_FULL_CONFIG_PATH:BOOL=OFF

//Build clipboard with FUSE file copy support
WITH_FUSE:BOOL=OFF

WITH_GFX_AV1:BOOL=OFF

//[experimental,unstable ABI/API] Enable Azure extension support

WITH_GFX_AZURE:BOOL=OFF

WITH_GFX_FRAME_DUMP:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with GProf profiler.
WITH_GPROF:BOOL=OFF

//Enable feature GSM for codec
WITH_GSM:BOOL=OFF

//Install .desktop files for clients
WITH_INSTALL_CLIENT_DESKTOP_FILES:BOOL=OFF

//Use compiled in md4 hash functions instead of OpenSSL/MBedTLS
WITH_INTERNAL_MD4:BOOL=OFF

//Use compiled in md5 hash functions instead of OpenSSL/MBedTLS
WITH_INTERNAL_MD5:BOOL=OFF

//Use compiled in rc4 functions instead of OpenSSL/MBedTLS
WITH_INTERNAL_RC4:BOOL=OFF

//Build with JANSSON (fail if not found)
WITH_JANSSON_REQUIRED:BOOL=OFF

//Use JPEG decoding.
WITH_JPEG:BOOL=OFF

//Build with JSON-C (fail if not found)
WITH_JSONC_REQUIRED:BOOL=OFF

//Build without any JSON support
WITH_JSON_DISABLED:BOOL=OFF

//Compile support for kerberos authentication.
WITH_KRB5:BOOL=OFF

WITH_LAME:BOOL=OFF

//Append library major version to name
WITH_LIBRARY_VERSIONING:BOOL=ON

//[experimental] build with LibreSSL
WITH_LIBRESSL:BOOL=OFF

//build WinPR with PNG support
WITH_LODEPNG:BOOL=OFF

//Enable OSX sound backend
WITH_MACAUDIO:BOOL=ON

//Generate manpages.
WITH_MANPAGES:BOOL=OFF

//Enable feature MbedTLS for cryptography
WITH_MBEDTLS:BOOL=OFF

//Use native SSPI modules
WITH_NATIVE_SSPI:BOOL=OFF

//Hide rdpSettings struct definition, only allow getter/setter
// access
WITH_OPAQUE_SETTINGS:BOOL=OFF

//[experimental] enable OpenCL support for primitives
WITH_OPENCL:BOOL=OFF

//Enable feature OpenH264 for codec
WITH_OPENH264:BOOL=OFF

//Enable feature OpenSSL for cryptography
WITH_OPENSSL:BOOL=ON

//compile with opus codec support
WITH_OPUS:BOOL=OFF

//Enable feature PCSC for smart card
WITH_PCSC:BOOL=OFF

//encryption, certificate validation, hashing functions
WITH_PKCS11:BOOL=ON

//Check for and include poll.h
WITH_POLL:BOOL=ON

//Compile profiler.
WITH_PROFILER:BOOL=OFF

//Use resource versioning
WITH_RESOURCE_VERSIONING:BOOL=OFF

//Build sample code
WITH_SAMPLE:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with gcc/clang address sanitizer.
WITH_SANITIZE_ADDRESS:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with gcc/clang memory sanitizer.
WITH_SANITIZE_MEMORY:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with gcc/clang thread sanitizer.
WITH_SANITIZE_THREAD:BOOL=OFF

//Build server binaries
WITH_SERVER:BOOL=OFF

//Build servers as a library with an interface
WITH_SERVER_INTERFACE:BOOL=ON

//Enable best platform specific vector instruction support
WITH_SIMD:BOOL=ON

//Emulate smartcards instead of redirecting readers
WITH_SMARTCARD_EMULATE:BOOL=ON

//Enable SmartCard API Inspector
WITH_SMARTCARD_INSPECT:BOOL=OFF

//Enable smartcard PCSC backend
WITH_SMARTCARD_PCSC:BOOL=ON

//Enable feature soxr for codec
WITH_SOXR:BOOL=OFF

//Build with sso-mib support
WITH_SSO_MIB:BOOL=OFF

//build with extensive streampool logging
WITH_STREAMPOOL_DEBUG:BOOL=OFF

//Use SWScale image library for screen resizing
WITH_SWSCALE:BOOL=OFF

//allows to export wLog to systemd journal
WITH_SYSTEMD:BOOL=OFF

//Build third-party components
WITH_THIRD_PARTY:BOOL=OFF

//Use compiled in timezone definitions
WITH_TIMEZONE_COMPILED:BOOL=ON

//Use ICU for improved timezone mapping
WITH_TIMEZONE_ICU:BOOL=OFF

//Use built-in Unicode conversion (don't use system-provided libraries)
WITH_UNICODE_BUILTIN:BOOL=OFF

//use uriparser library to handle URIs
WITH_URIPARSER:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with valgrind helpers.
WITH_VALGRIND_MEMCHECK:BOOL=OFF

//Compile with verbose WINPR_ASSERT.
WITH_VERBOSE_WINPR_ASSERT:BOOL=ON

//Build WinPR deprecated symbols
WITH_WINPR_DEPRECATED:BOOL=OFF

//Build WinPR helper binaries
WITH_WINPR_TOOLS:BOOL=ON

//Build winpr-tools cli programs
WITH_WINPR_TOOLS_CLI:BOOL=ON

//build X11 client/server
WITH_X11:BOOL=OFF

//Enable feature yuv for codec
WITH_YUV:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a file.
ZLIB_INCLUDE_DIR:PATH=/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/include

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG:FILEPATH=ZLIB_LIBRARY_DEBUG-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
ZLIB_LIBRARY_RELEASE:FILEPATH=/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk/usr/lib/libz.tbd

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for cJSON.
cJSON_DIR:PATH=cJSON_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a file.
cJSON_HEADER:PATH=cJSON_HEADER-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
cJSON_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=cJSON_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for jansson.
jansson_DIR:PATH=jansson_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a file.
jansson_HEADER:PATH=jansson_HEADER-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
jansson_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=jansson_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for json-c.
json-c_DIR:PATH=json-c_DIR-NOTFOUND

//Path to a file.
json-c_HEADER:PATH=json-c_HEADER-NOTFOUND

//Path to a library.
json-c_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=json-c_LIBRARY-NOTFOUND

//Value Computed by CMake
nlav2_workspace_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/Users/sedwards/source/nlav2/build

//Value Computed by CMake
nlav2_workspace_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
nlav2_workspace_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/Users/sedwards/source/nlav2

//Path to a library.
pkgcfg_lib__OPENSSL_crypto:FILEPATH=/usr/local/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib

//Path to a library.
pkgcfg_lib__OPENSSL_ssl:FILEPATH=/usr/local/Cellar/openssl@3/3.6.2/lib/libssl.dylib

//The directory containing a CMake configuration file for uriparser.
uriparser_DIR:PATH=uriparser_DIR-NOTFOUND
